firebird.query: SELECT ID, SIFRA, BARCODE, NAZIV, CENA, GRUPA, JEDINICA_MERE, AKTIVAN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM ARTIKALI WHERE AKTIVAN = 1 ORDER BY ID
firebird.queryDelta: SELECT ID, SIFRA, BARCODE, NAZIV, CENA, GRUPA, JEDINICA_MERE, AKTIVAN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM ARTIKALI WHERE UPDATED_AT > ? ORDER BY ID
firebird.countQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ARTIKALI WHERE AKTIVAN = 1
firebird.deactivateQuery: SELECT ID FROM ARTIKALI WHERE AKTIVAN = 0 AND UPDATED_AT > ?

file._comment_csv: CSV options — set delimiter, column mapping below
file._comment_json: JSON must be an array of objects. Map field names below.
